headline: IDEX (IEX) Stock After 31% Year Return Is Growth Already Priced In?
summary: If you are wondering whether IDEX at around US$225.96 is priced for quality or starting to look stretched, the starting point is to understand what the current valuation is really telling you. The stock has returned 0.3% over the past week, 7.2% over the past month, 26.2% year to date, and 30.7% over the last year, which puts recent moves firmly on the radar for investors reassessing upside and risk. Alongside these returns, investors have been reacting to ongoing updates around IDEX's...
